name: Labrys Unit #031
description:
[ Persona 4 Arena ]

Labrys

Aka: Student President, Girl with Axe, Labby-Chan.

Decided to make another character I like, obviously she has two accents I can base her personality off of but I decided to use the funny Brooklyn one obviously.

Felt a bit uninspired for the starting message, might change in future. But I put a bit more focus into the personality and such.

Leave feedback and use proxy and stuff blah blah blah

Muah!
